title: Somatic Signs of Withdrawal
steps: Place two observation cylinders on a surface
Place one rat in each cylinder
Set a timer to 30 minutes, at which point both observers will begin to watch the animals
Behaviors to be tallied: Jumps Teeth Chattering Ptosis Blinks Head Shakes Paw Tremors Abdominal Contractions Genital Licks Yawns
Behaviors to be scored (0-3): Pilo erection Diarrhea

One tally is one behavior isolated by another behavior Example: the animal chatters teeth for a while, then licks genital, then chatters teeth again_ that is two tallies for teeth chattering and one for genital licking
Pay attention to the animal during the full 30 minutes- do not distract each other
Sum the scores for each animal to get the withdrawal score
creator: Nathan Rizo
